name: Lovely Lemon Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 9-inch springform pan with cooking spray and sprinkle half the crumbs.
2. In a food processor, combine lemon gelatin powder and boiling water. Mix until gelatin is dissolved.
3. Add cottage cheese and cream cheese; process until smooth.
4. Pour mixture into mixing bowl. Fold in whipped topping and yellow food coloring.
5. Pour into prepared pan and spread evenly.
6. Sprinkle remaining crumbs around the outer edge.
7. Chill four hours, or until set. Then top center with pie filling.
